article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 1, 2023 (BSS) - Dhaka Chamber of Commerce and Industry (DCCI) today underscored the need for Public-Private Partnership (PPP) to manage sustainable economic recovery.

To further accelerate the country's economic recovery in 2023, DCCI urged the government to focus on uninterrupted and affordable energy supply to local and export-oriented manufacturing industries, improve the ease of doing business, develop an infrastructural environment conducive to attracting local and foreign inves

llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links devaluation of the Taka (USD-BDT) to negative impacts on imports of energy and raw materials, matching country-level exchange-rate effects on imports described by the feature.

verification.judge_reasoning: The article directly states that 'devaluation of the Taka against the US Dollar have challenged the country's financial sector, resulting in some negative impact on the import of energy, industrial raw materials...' — explicitly linking Taka devaluation to reduced imports at the country level.
